label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative comparison against peers or standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment

label: Personal Recollection
definition: First-person memory or anecdote from Kastner

label: AI Exchange
definition: A question posed by Kastner and the AI response extracted as a structured observation

label: Topic Insight
definition: An analytical claim or framework point within a technology topic deep-dive

label: Analytical Finding
definition: Archive-mining result: a count, rate, or pattern finding

label: Longitudinal Decomposition
definition: Phase or period assignment in a single-entity longitudinal study

label: Thematic Thread Decomposition
definition: Thread-level claim, population count, or named exemplar in a longitudinal study

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure and dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing entities

label: Benchmarking
definition: Comparison against industry standards or peers

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection via interviews or surveys

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and records

label: Archive Mining
definition: Extraction of patterns and statistics from the master CSV corpus

label: Longitudinal Single-Entity
definition: Deep-dive study of one firm across all archive decades

label: Thematic Thread Decomposition
definition: Eleven-thread decomposition of entity coverage

label: Prediction vs Outcome Scorecard
definition: Tabulation of viability predictions against actual outcomes

label: Oral History
definition: First-person spoken or written recollection of events

label: AI Dialog
definition: Question-and-answer exchange between a human and an AI system

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Reasonable basis but limited corroboration

label: Low Confidence
definition: Directional judgment with limited evidence

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources

label: Refuted
definition: Contradicted by subsequent events or independent sources

label: Wiki Driven Replication
definition: Study-specific code: wiki-driven-replication

label: Competitive Position
definition: Study-specific code: competitive-position
